---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or an improvement
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like**
A clear description of the tool or improvement.

**The problem it solves**
What daily-work pain does this remove?

**Rough shape**
If you have one in mind: command name (`Verb-TolNoun`), key parameters, example usage.

**Alternatives**
Anything you currently do instead.
